display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（挨打猫 v1.1・小小维修兔 v1.29・文生图测试版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: optional per-RabbitMirror image generation through a user-configured OpenAI-compatible image API; uses a separate image prompt with CHAR/USER appearance anchors, safe-scene constraints, deduplicated one-request-per-generation behavior, and an in-mirror lower-right image frame. Disabled means zero image prompt construction and zero image requests.
